components.rationale: SiteHeader already exists with full nav props (wordmark, tagline, navLinks, ctaLabel/Href, onSearchClick). Renders fixed top bar with backdrop blur, mobile sheet menu, and CTA pill. Default nav links already include 'Yoga Courses' which is the section the course page lives under. Drop-in.
components.responsive_concerns: Component is already responsive (xl: nav, mobile sheet, h-[88px]/sm:h-[92px]). No changes needed.

components.rationale: Existing sections/hero-section.tsx is the homepage hero (eyebrow + headline split + offer-chip cards + marquee) — wholly different from the course hero (breadcrumb + title + 4 meta chips + CTA + dark image card right). Build new.

HeroOfferChip in hero-section is an internal CTA chip with eyebrow+label+colored arrow button — different semantics from the small 110x104 icon-over-label meta tile (Sat & Sun / Studio / time / English). Card primitive (size='sm') is too heavy. New small primitive.

No in-page sticky nav strip exists. components/ui/navigation-menu.tsx is the shadcn primary nav primitive and is too feature-heavy for a 5-link anchor strip with active pill. Build a small dedicated component.

No matching section exists. components/shared/section-heading.tsx may help for the eyebrow+heading pattern — verify in build phase and import if compatible. Otherwise a thin new section wrapping eyebrow + h2 + two paragraphs.
No section for a 'What You'll Gain' 2x3 highlights grid exists. Build new section that maps over items and renders highlight-card.

Base Card primitive matches the chrome (surface-1, border, rounded-lg, hover surface-2) but needs a 52x52 icon tile slot in the corner. Lightweight composition wrapper using <Card> + custom inner layout — no new variant required on Card.tsx itself. Saving as a new file that composes Card.
No horizontal-scroll/carousel section exists. No 'carousel' primitive in repo. Build a new section with overflow-x-auto + snap on mobile, flex row at desktop, plus a scroll-next-button on the right.

294x148 plain title+body card with thin border/rounded corners — composable from Card size='sm' + CardHeader/CardTitle/CardDescription. Create a thin wrapper component for clean call sites in curriculum-section.

No 46x46 circular icon-only nav button exists. ui/button.tsx supports 'icon' size but rounded-lg, not full-circle, and lacks the brand-primary fill + up-right arrow. Reused in instructors-section too — worth its own file.
No two-column image-left checklist-right section exists.
No rounded checklist row primitive exists. Small composition: rounded tile with a 22x22 brand-lite check badge + label.
components/instructors/instructors-content.tsx is a CMS-driven list page, not a 4-card horizontal-row 'Meet Your Instructor's' module. Build a new section that reuses scroll-next-button.
No 98x98-avatar + name + role card exists. Card primitive's CardImage is 192px tall — wrong shape. Build a small dedicated card (avatar left, two text lines right).
No FAQ section exists.

No Accordion / Disclosure / Collapsible primitive exists anywhere in apps/web/src/components/. Decomposition flagged it as 'existing-primitive' optimistically — verified absent. Build a minimal native <details>-or-controlled-state disclosure with + / − toggle and horizontal border row.

components/sections/programs-grid-section.tsx already renders ProgramCard in a 3-col grid for the homepage. It is close but is wired for 'Programs' framing with its own eyebrow/heading defaults — wrapping it would force passing all props and override the framing copy. Cleaner to build a thin new section (eyebrow 'Top Popular Yoga Course' + heading + subhead + 3 ProgramCard) that imports ProgramCard directly.

ProgramCard from commit 1b516d0 exposes exactly the props popular-courses needs: title, href, imageSrc, imageAlt, meta (icon+label[]), cta, priority. It already renders the image-top, meta row with warm dots, dashed footer with 'View Program →' CTA. The only gap is the small instructor avatar+name shown in the Figma popular-courses cards (1:7851) — see note below; either pass instructor via a new optional prop (extend) or render it outside the card. Defaulting to reuse-as-is and letting build-planner decide on the instructor prop.
components.responsive_concerns: ProgramCard uses aspectRatio 413/235 + responsive sizes prop — already responsive.

components.rationale: components/sections/closing-cta-section.tsx is a single-CTA closing block — not the 3-card 'Free Trial / Speak to us / Take a Guided Path' grid. Build new.
No giant centered 'Bodhi · Begin where you are.' brand block exists. closing-cta-section.tsx is a different layout. Build a separate section (lives above site-footer, below next-steps-cta-grid).

SiteFooter (uncommitted but on disk) accepts brand{wordmark,tagline,url}, columns[], address{}, legalLeft/Right — matches the 4-col 'School / Visit / Stay close' layout in the decomposition. Tagline 'Designed quietly. Practised daily.' is already the default legalRight. Drop-in.
components.responsive_concerns: Grid is sm:grid-cols-2 → md:grid-cols-[1.5fr_1fr_1fr_1fr] — already responsive.

warnings: Decomposer flagged faq-item as existing-primitive — verified no Accordion/Disclosure/Collapsible component exists in apps/web/src/components/ui/. Treat as 'new'.

popular-courses Figma frame (1:7851) shows instructor avatar+name inside the card. Current ProgramCard has no instructor slot. Build-planner should decide: (a) extend ProgramCard with optional instructor prop, or (b) skip instructor display for this section. Recommended: (a) — additive prop is safe.
Curriculum and Instructors sections both reuse the same 46x46 circular next-arrow button (Figma 1:7817 / 1:8070 share asset imgGroup1171281795). Build scroll-next-button once, import twice.

Existing components/layout/header.tsx and components/layout/footer.tsx are older variants — superseded by site-header.tsx / site-footer.tsx at components root. Builders should NOT confuse them. Use the root-level SiteHeader/SiteFooter.
